summary: Prevent cumulative pull-request path matching from repeatedly launching the heavyweight OpenSCAD WebAssembly source build while preserving every intentional build path.

decisions.topic: Latest-commit debounce for heavyweight WASM CI
decisions.decision: Keep the pull-request path filter as the cheap outer selector, then make a read-only detector job build unconditionally for workflow_dispatch and non-synchronize pull-request actions while allowing synchronize events to reach the heavyweight job only when github.event.before..github.event.after changes .github/workflows/build-openscad-wasm.yml.
decisions.rationale: GitHub evaluates pull-request path filters against the cumulative base-to-head diff, so every later synchronize event continued to match after the workflow entered the branch. An exact latest-range detector removes redundant source builds without suppressing manual builds, the initial/reopened path-selected build, or a synchronize event that actually changes the build recipe.

testEvidence.criterion: The heavyweight build runs for manual dispatch and path-selected non-synchronize actions, but an unrelated synchronize event does not retrigger it from the cumulative PR diff
testEvidence.test: Statically require the reviewed exact read-only detector job, before/after event bindings, workflow-file-only git diff, and detector dependency on the heavyweight build, with selected adversarial mutations for the security-sensitive bindings and branches.

red.outcome: RED: 1 failed and 26 passed. The regression assertion failed because jobs.detector did not exist, statically detecting the missing debounce after hosted run 29503768070 exposed the cumulative path-filter retrigger.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/wasm-build-workflow.test.ts; pnpm.cmd check:wasm-workflow; pnpm.cmd typecheck; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN on the exact final reviewed tree: 1 focused file and all 32 tests passed in 549 ms; the production workflow contract passed; TypeScript exited 0; lint and source policy checked 343 files with zero diagnostics.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
